description: Detect duplicate or overlapping knowledge notes and propose safe merge strategies without losing information

evals.prompt: Check my knowledge base for duplicate notes
evals.expected_output: Scans knowledge/**/*.md, produces duplicate report with HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW similarity groupings, suggests merge or link actions

evals.prompt: I have too many overlapping notes about microservices, clean them up
evals.expected_output: Identifies overlapping notes, selects primary note, proposes what to merge/remove, NEVER auto-deletes

evals.prompt: Before I set up RAG, make sure my notes are not duplicated
evals.expected_output: Runs duplicate detection, provides cleanup actions, prioritizes HIGH similarity duplicates
